_help.bar_height: Bar height in pixels. Range: 28–56. Font sizes scale automatically unless overridden.
_help.show_battery: Show the battery icon and percentage. Set false to hide on desktop PCs.
_help.show_media: Show the media widget when something is playing. Auto-hides when nothing is playing.
_help.show_title: Show the active window title on the left side.
_help.show_windows_logo: Show the Windows logo button (power menu: sleep, restart, shut down).
_help.clock_show_seconds: Include seconds in the clock display.
_help.clock_show_date: Include the date alongside the time.
_help.clock_date_format: Date format string (C# DateTime). Examples: 'MM/dd/yyyy', 'dd/MM/yyyy', 'ddd MMM d', 'yyyy-MM-dd'.
_help.use_accent_color: Tint the bar background with your Windows accent color. false = dark grey.
_help.title_max_length: Hard-truncate the window title at N characters (appends …). 0 = no limit.
_help.media_max_length: Hard-truncate the media bar text at N characters (appends …). 0 = no limit.
_help.font_size_text: Override text font size in pixels (battery %, time, title). 0 = auto-scale from bar_height.
_help.font_size_icon: Override icon font size in pixels (battery, network glyphs). 0 = auto-scale from bar_height.
